# MuleSoft Salesforce Pub/Sub Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.3) of Salesforce Pub/Sub Connector documentation.
> See [Salesforce Pub/Sub Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-pubsub-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Salesforce Pub/Sub Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Salesforce Pub/Sub Connector 1.3](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-pubsub-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Salesforce Pub/Sub Connector 1.3 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-pubsub-connector/latest/salesforce-pubsub-connector-examples.md)
